seoTitle: Mutawintji vs Muttama — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mutawintji and Muttama. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mutawintji and Muttama.
heading: Mutawintji vs Muttama — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mutawintji, New South Wales and Muttama, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mutawintji has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Muttama (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mutawintji or Muttama safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mutawintji has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Muttama scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mutawintji scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Muttama scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mutawintji or Muttama?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mutawintji has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
